categories.name: Universal & Tensile Testing
categories.blurb: Precision tensile, compression and universal test frames for plastics, films, tapes, geomembranes and welded joints.

categories.name: Impact Testing
categories.blurb: Instruments that measure toughness and impact resistance of polymers and films under sudden load.

categories.name: Melt Flow & Rheology
categories.blurb: Melt flow index and flow-variation apparatus for quality control of thermoplastic resins.

categories.name: Thermal & Ageing
categories.blurb: Ovens, baths and chambers for conditioning, thermal ageing, softening point and oxidation-induction testing.

categories.name: Composition & Optical
categories.blurb: Apparatus to determine carbon-black content, ash content and optical opacity of polymer compounds.

categories.name: Pressure & Pipe Testing
categories.blurb: Hydrostatic pressure rigs for long-term and short-term strength testing of pipes and fittings.

categories.name: Specimen Preparation & Cutters
categories.blurb: Notch cutters and contour cutters that prepare accurate, standard-compliant test specimens.

categories.name: Moulding & Processing
categories.blurb: Laboratory presses, mills and extrusion plant for compounding and preparing test sheets and films.
